noncomputable def Inputs.RvM (I : Inputs) (U : вДЭ) : вДЭ := riemannZeta.RvM I.bвВБ I.bвВВ I.bвВГ U

noncomputable def Inputs.BвВБ (I : Inputs) (U V : вДЭ) : вДЭ := ( 1/(2*ѕА) + ((I.bвВБ * log U) + I.bвВВ)/(U * (log U) * (log (U/(2*ѕА)))) ) * (log (V/U) * (log ( sqrt (V*U) / (2*ѕА) ))) + 2 * (I.RvM U) / U

@[blueprint
  "fks-lemma-2-1"
  (title := "FKS Lemma 2.1")
  (statement := /--
  If $|N(T) - (T/2\pi \log(T/2\pi e) + 7/8)| \leq R(T)$ then $\sum_{U \leq \gamma < V} 1/\gamma \leq B_1(U,V)$.-/)]
theorem lemma_2_1 (I : Inputs) {U V : вДЭ} (hU : U вЙ• 1) (hV : V вЙ• U) : riemannZeta.zeroes_sum Set.univ (Set.Ico U V) (fun ѕБ вЖ¶ 1 / ѕБ.im) вЙ§ I.BвВБ U V := by sorry

@[blueprint
  "fks-corollary_2_3"
  (title := "FKS Corollary 2.3")
  (statement := /-- For each pair $T_0,S_0$ in Table 1 we have, for all $V > T_0$, $\sum_{0 < \gamma < V} 1/\gamma < S_0 + B_1(T_0,V)$. -/)]
theorem corollary_2_3 (I : Inputs) {V : вДЭ} (hV : V > I.TвВА) : riemannZeta.zeroes_sum Set.univ (Set.Ioo 0 V) (fun ѕБ вЖ¶ 1 / ѕБ.im) < I.SвВА + I.BвВБ I.TвВА V := by sorry

noncomputable def sвВА (ѕГ U V : вДЭ) := riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ico ѕГ 1) (Set.Ico U V) (fun ѕБ вЖ¶ 1 / ѕБ.im)

noncomputable def _root_.Real.Gamma.incomplete (s : вДЭ) (x : вДЭ) : вДЭ := вИЂ t in Set.Ioi x, exp (-t) * t ^ (s - 1)

noncomputable def _root_.Complex.Gamma.incomplete (s : вДВ) (x : вДЭ) : вДВ := вИЂ t in Set.Ioi x, exp (-t) * t ^ (s - 1)

noncomputable def Inputs.BвВА (I : Inputs) (ѕГ U V : вДЭ) : вДЭ :=
  (I.ZDB.cвВБ ѕГ) * (log V)^(I.ZDB.q ѕГ) / V ^ (1 - (I.ZDB.p ѕГ)) + (I.ZDB.cвВВ ѕГ) * (log V)^2 / V
  + (I.ZDB.cвВБ ѕГ / (1 - I.ZDB.p ѕГ)^(I.ZDB.q ѕГ+1)) * (Real.Gamma.incomplete (I.ZDB.q ѕГ+1) ((1-I.ZDB.p ѕГ)*(log U)) - Real.Gamma.incomplete (I.ZDB.q ѕГ+1) ((1-I.ZDB.p ѕГ)*(log V)))
  + (I.ZDB.cвВВ ѕГ) * (Real.Gamma.incomplete 3 ((log U)) - Real.Gamma.incomplete 3 ((log V))
  )

@[blueprint
  "fks-lemma-2-5"
  (title := "FKS Lemma 2.5")
  (statement := /-- Let $T_0 \geq 2$ and $\gamma > 0$.  Assume that there exist $c_1, c_2, p, q, T_0$ for which one has a zero density bound.  Assume $\sigma \geq 5/8$ and $T_0 \leq U < V$.  Then $s_0(ѕГ,U,V) \leq B_0(\sigma,U,V)$. -/)]
theorem lemma_2_5 (I : Inputs) {ѕГ U V : вДЭ}
  (hTвВА : I.ZDB.TвВА вЙ• 2)
  (hѕГ : ѕГ вЙ• 5 / 8)
  (hѕГ' : ѕГ вИИ I.ZDB.ѕГ_range)
  (hU : U вЙ• I.ZDB.TвВА)
  (hV : V > U) :
  sвВА ѕГ U V вЙ§ I.BвВА ѕГ U V := by sorry

@[blueprint
  "fks-remark-2-6-a"
  (title := "FKS Remark 2-6-a")
  (statement := /-- $\Gamma(3,x) = (x^2 + 2(x+1)) e^{-x}$.-/)]
theorem remark_2_6_a (x : вДЭ) : Real.Gamma.incomplete 3 x = (x^2 + 2 * (x + 1)) * exp (-x) := by sorry

@[blueprint
  "fks-remark-2-6-b"
  (title := "FKS Remark 2-6-b")
  (statement := /-- For $s>1$, one has $\Gamma(s,x) \sim x^{s-1} e^{-x}$.-/)]
theorem remark_2_6_b (s : вДЭ) (h : s > 1) : Filter.Tendsto (fun x вЖ¶ Real.Gamma.incomplete s x / (x^(s-1) * exp (-x))) Filter.atTop (nhds 1) := by sorry



@[blueprint
  "fks-theorem-3-1"
  (title := "FKS Theorem 3.1")
  (statement := /-- Let $x > e^{50}$ be half an odd integer and suppose that $50 < T < x$.  Then $E_\psi(x) \leq \sum_{|\gamma| < T} |x^{\rho-1}/\rho| + 2 \log^2 x / T.$ -/)]
theorem theorem_3_1 {x T : вДЭ} (hx : x > exp 50) (hodd : вИГ X, Odd X вИІ x = X / 2) (hT : T вИИ Set.Ioo 50 x) : EѕИ x вЙ§ riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ioo 0 1) (Set.Ioo (-T) T) (fun ѕБ вЖ¶ вАЦx^(ѕБ - 1) / ѕБвАЦ) + 2 * (log x)^2 / T := by sorry

@[blueprint
  "fks-theorem-3-2"
  (title := "FKS Theorem 3.2")
  (statement := /-- For any $\alpha \in (0,1/2]$ and $\omega \in [0,1]$ there exist $M, x_M$ such that for $\max(51, \log x) < T < (x^\alpha-2)/5$ and some $T^* \in [T, 2.45 T]$,
  $$ |\psi(x) - (x - \sum_{|\gamma| \leq T^*} x^\rho/\rho)| вЙ§ M x / T * log^{1-\omega} x  $$ for all $x вЙ• x_M$. -/)]
theorem theorem_3_2 (ќ± ѕЙ : вДЭ) (hќ± : ќ± вИИ Set.Ioc 0 (1 / 2)) (hѕЙ : ѕЙ вИИ Set.Icc 0 1) : вИГ M xM : вДЭ, вИА x, вИА T вИИ Set.Ioo (max 51 (log x)) ((x^ќ± - 2) / 5), вИГ Tstar вИИ Set.Icc T (2.45 * T), вИА x вЙ• xM, вАЦѕИ x - (x - riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ioo 0 1) (Set.Ioo (-Tstar) Tstar) (fun ѕБ вЖ¶ x^ѕБ / ѕБ))вАЦ вЙ§ M * x / T * (log x)^(1 - ѕЙ) := by sorry

noncomputable def ќµвВБ (x T : вДЭ) : вДЭ := 2 * (log x)^2 / T

@[blueprint
  "fks-proposition-3-4"
  (title := "FKS Proposition 3.4")
  (statement := /--  Let $x > e^{50}$ and $3 \log x < T < \sqrt{x}/3$.  Then
  $$ E_\psi(x) вЙ§ \sum_{|\gamma| < T} |x^{\rho-1}/\rho| + 2 \log^2 x / T.$$-/)]
theorem proposition_3_4 {x T : вДЭ} (hx : x > exp 50) (hT : T вИИ Set.Ioo (3 * log x) (sqrt x / 3)) : EѕИ x вЙ§ riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ioo 0 1) (Set.Ioo (-T) T) (fun ѕБ вЖ¶ вАЦx^(ѕБ - 1) / ѕБвАЦ) + ќµвВБ x T := by sorry

noncomputable def riemannZeta.Sigma (T x a b : вДЭ) : вДЭ := 2 * (riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ico a b) (Set.Ioo 0 T) (fun ѕБ вЖ¶ x^(ѕБ.re - 1) / ѕБ.im))

noncomputable def ќµвВВ (I : Inputs) (x ѕГвВБ T : вДЭ) : вДЭ := 2 * x^(-0.5:вДЭ) * (I.SвВА + I.BвВБ I.TвВА T) + (x^(ѕГвВБ - 1) - x^(-0.5:вДЭ)) * (I.BвВБ I.HвВА T)

@[blueprint
  "fks-proposition-3-6"
  (title := "FKS Proposition 3.6")
  (statement := /-- Let $\sigma_1 \in (1/2,1)$ and let $(T_0,S_0)$ be taken from Table 1.  Then $\Sigma_0^{\sigma_1} вЙ§ 2 x^{-1/2} (S_0 + B_1(T_0,T)) + (x_1^{\sigma_1-1} - x^{-1/2}) B_1(H_0,T)$.-/)]
theorem proposition_3_6 (I : Inputs) {ѕГвВБ T x : вДЭ} (hѕГ_1 : ѕГвВБ вИИ Set.Icc 0.5 1) (hT : T > I.TвВА) (x : вДЭ) : riemannZeta.Sigma T x 0 ѕГвВБ вЙ§ ќµвВВ I x ѕГвВБ T := by sorry

noncomputable def HѕГ (HвВА R ѕГ : вДЭ) : вДЭ := max HвВА (exp (1 / (R*(1-ѕГ))))

theorem riemannZeta.HѕГ_zeroes (HвВА R ѕГ : вДЭ) (hHвВА : riemannZeta.RH_up_to HвВА) (hR : riemannZeta.classicalZeroFree R) : riemannZeta.N' ѕГ (HѕГ HвВА R ѕГ) = 0 := by sorry

@[blueprint
"fks-eq13"
  (title := "FKS equation (3.13)")
  (statement := /-- $\Sigma_a^b = 2 * \sum_{H_a вЙ§ \gamma < T; a \leq \beta < b} \frac{x^{\beta-1}}{\gamma}$.-/)]
theorem eq_13 {HвВА R a b T x : вДЭ} (hHвВА : riemannZeta.RH_up_to HвВА) (hR : riemannZeta.classicalZeroFree R) : riemannZeta.Sigma T x a b = 2 * riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ico a b) (Set.Ioc (HѕГ HвВА R a) T) (fun ѕБ вЖ¶ x^(ѕБ.re - 1) / ѕБ.im) := by sorry

noncomputable def ѕГn (ѕГвВБ ѕГвВВ : вДЭ) (n N : вДХ) : вДЭ := ѕГвВБ + (ѕГвВВ - ѕГвВБ) * n / N

noncomputable def Hn (HвВА R ѕГвВБ ѕГвВВ : вДЭ) (n N : вДХ) : вДЭ := HѕГ HвВА R (ѕГn ѕГвВБ ѕГвВВ n N)

@[blueprint
"fks-remark-3-7"
  (title := "FKS Remark 3.7")
  (statement := /-- If $\sigma < 1 - 1/R \log H_0$ then $H_ѕГ = H_0$.-/)]
theorem remark_3_7 {HвВА R ѕГ : вДЭ} (hѕГ : ѕГ < 1 - 1 / (R * log HвВА)) : HѕГ HвВА R ѕГ = HвВА := by sorry

noncomputable def ќµвВГ (I : Inputs) (x ѕГвВБ ѕГвВВ : вДЭ) (N : вДХ) (T : вДЭ) : вДЭ :=
  2 * x^(-(1 - ѕГвВБ) + (ѕГвВВ - ѕГвВБ) / N) * (I.BвВА ѕГвВБ (HѕГ I.HвВА I.R ѕГвВБ) T) +
  2 * x^(1 - ѕГвВБ) * (1 - x^(-(ѕГвВВ - ѕГвВБ) / N)) * вИС n вИИ Finset.Ico 1 N, (I.BвВА (ѕГn ѕГвВБ ѕГвВВ n N) (Hn I.HвВА I.R ѕГвВБ ѕГвВВ n N) T) * x^((ѕГвВВ - ѕГвВБ) * (n + 1) / N)

@[blueprint
"fks-proposition-3-8"
  (title := "FKS Proposition 3.8")
  (statement := /-- Let $N \geq 2$ be an integer.  If $5/8 \leq \sigma_1 < \sigma_2 \leq 1$, $T \geq H_0$, then $\Sigma_{\sigma_1}^{\sigma_2} вЙ§ 2 x^{-(1-\sigma_1)+(\sigma_2-\sigma_1/N)}B_0(\sigma_1, H_{\sigma_1}, T) + 2 x^{(1-\sigma_1)} (1 - x^{-(\sigma_2-\sigma_1)/N}) \sum_{n=1}^{N-1} B_0(\sigma^{(n)}, H^{(n)}, T) x^{(\sigma_2-\sigma_1) (n+1)/N}$.-/)]
theorem proposition_3_8 (I : Inputs) (x : вДЭ) {ѕГвВБ ѕГвВВ : вДЭ} (N : вДХ) (T : вДЭ) (hѕГвВБ : ѕГвВБ вИИ Set.Icc (5 / 8) 1) (hѕГвВВ : ѕГвВВ вИИ Set.Ioc ѕГвВБ 1) (hѕГ : Set.Icc ѕГвВБ ѕГвВВ вКЖ I.ZDB.ѕГ_range) (hT : T вЙ• I.HвВА) : riemannZeta.Sigma T x ѕГвВБ ѕГвВВ вЙ§ ќµвВГ I x ѕГвВБ ѕГвВВ N T := by sorry

@[blueprint
"fks-corollary-3-10"
  (title := "FKS Corollary 3.10")
  (statement := /-- If $\sigma_1 \geq 0.9$ then $\Sigma_{\sigma_1}^{\sigma_2} \leq 0.00125994 x^{\sigma_2-1}$.-/)]
theorem corollary_3_10 {ѕГвВБ ѕГвВВ T x : вДЭ} (hѕГвВБ : ѕГвВБ вИИ Set.Icc 0.9 1) (hѕГвВВ : ѕГвВВ вИИ Set.Ioc ѕГвВБ 1) : riemannZeta.Sigma T x ѕГвВБ ѕГвВВ вЙ§ 0.00125994 * x^(ѕГвВВ - 1) := by sorry

@[blueprint
"fks-proposition-3-11"
  (title := "FKS Proposition 3.11")
  (statement := /-- Let $5/8 < \sigma_2 \leq 1$, $t_0 = t_0(\sigma_2,x) = \max(H_{\sigma_2}, \exp( \sqrt{\log x}/R))$ and $T > 0$.  Let $K \geq 2$ and consider a strictly increasing sequence $(t_k)_{k=0}^K$ such that $t_k = T$.  Then $\Sigma_{\sigma_2}^1 вЙ§ 2 N(\sigma_2,T) x^{-1/R\log t_0}/t_0$ and $\Sigma_{\sigma_2}^1 вЙ§ 2 ((\sum_{k=1}^{K-1} N(\sigma_2, t_k) (x^{-1/R\log t_{k-1}} / t_{k-1} - x^{-1/(R \log t_k)}/t_k)) + x^{-1/R \log t_{K-1}}/t_{K-1} N(\sigma_2,T))$.-/)]
theorem proposition_3_11 (I : Inputs) {ѕГвВВ T x : вДЭ} (K : вДХ) (hѕГвВВ : ѕГвВВ вИИ Set.Ioc (5 / 8) 1) (t_seq : Fin (K + 2) вЖТ вДЭ) (ht0 : t_seq 0 = max (HѕГ I.HвВА I.R ѕГвВВ) (exp (sqrt (log x) / I.R))) (htK : t_seq (Fin.last (K + 1)) = T) (ht_incr : StrictMono t_seq) : riemannZeta.Sigma T x ѕГвВВ 1 вЙ§ 2 * (riemannZeta.N' ѕГвВВ T) * x^(-1 / (I.R * log (t_seq 0))) / (t_seq 0)
  вИІ
  riemannZeta.Sigma T x ѕГвВВ 1 вЙ§ 2 * (вИС k вИИ Finset.Ioo 0 (Fin.last (K+1)), riemannZeta.N' ѕГвВВ (t_seq k) * (x^(-1 / (I.R * log (t_seq (k - 1)))) / (t_seq (k - 1)) - x^(-1 / (I.R * log (t_seq k))) / (t_seq k)) ) + x^(-1 / (I.R * log (t_seq (Fin.last K).castSucc))) / (t_seq (Fin.last K).castSucc) * riemannZeta.N' ѕГвВВ T := by sorry

noncomputable def ќµвВД (I : Inputs) (tвВА x ѕГвВВ : вДЭ) (K : вДХ) (T : вДЭ) : вДЭ :=
  let t : Fin (K+2) вЖТ вДЭ := fun k вЖ¶ tвВА * (T / tвВА)^(k / K)
  2 * вИС k вИИ Finset.Ioo 0 (Fin.last (K+1)), (x^(-1 / (I.R * log (t k))) / (t k)) * (I.ZDB.N ѕГвВВ (t (k + 1)) - I.ZDB.N ѕГвВВ (t k)) + 2 * (I.ZDB.N ѕГвВВ (t 1)) * x^(-1 / (I.R * log (t 0))) / (t 0)

@[blueprint
"fks-corollary-3-12"
  (title := "FKS Corollary 3.12")
  (statement := /-- Let $5/8 < \sigma_2 \leq 1$, $t_0 = t_0(\sigma_2, x) = \max\left(H_{\sigma_2}, \exp\left(\sqrt{\frac{\log x}{R}}\right)\right)$, $T > t_0$. Let $K \geq 2$, $\lambda = (T/t_0)^{1/K}$, and consider $(t_k)_{k=0}^K$ the sequence given by $t_k = t_0 \lambda^k$. Then
\[
\Sigma^1_{\sigma_2} = 2 \sum_{\substack{0 < \gamma < T \\ \sigma_2 \leq \beta < 1}} \frac{x^{\beta-1}}{\gamma} \leq \varepsilon_4(x, \sigma_2, K, T),
\]
where
\[
\varepsilon_4(x, \sigma_2, K, T) = 2 \sum_{k=1}^{K-1} \frac{x^{-\frac{1}{R \log t_k}}}{t_k} \left( \tilde{N}(\sigma_2, t_{k+1}) - \tilde{N}(\sigma_2, t_k) \right) + 2\tilde{N}(\sigma_2, t_1) \frac{x^{-\frac{1}{R(\log t_0)}}}{t_0},
\]
and $\tilde{N}(\sigma, T)$ satisfy (ZDB) $N(\sigma, T) \leq \tilde{N}(\sigma, T)$.
-/)]
theorem corollary_3_12 (I : Inputs) {ѕГвВВ tвВА T x : вДЭ} (K : вДХ) (hѕГвВВ : ѕГвВВ вИИ Set.Ioc (5 / 8) 1) (htвВА : tвВА = max (HѕГ I.HвВА I.R ѕГвВВ) (exp (sqrt (log x) / I.R))) (hT : T > tвВА) (ZDB : zero_density_bound) :
  riemannZeta.Sigma T x ѕГвВВ 1 вЙ§ ќµвВД I tвВА x ѕГвВВ K T := by sorry

@[blueprint
"fks-proposition-3-14"
  (title := "FKS Proposition 3-14")
  (statement := /-- Fix $K \geq 2$ and $c > 1$, and set $t_0$, $T$, and $\sigma_2$ as functions of $x$ defined by
\begin{equation}
t_0 = t_0(x) = \exp\left(\sqrt{\frac{\log x}{R}}\right), \quad T = t_0^c, \quad \text{and} \quad \sigma_2 = 1 - \frac{2}{R \log t_0}.
\end{equation}
Then, with $\varepsilon_4(x, \sigma_2, K, T)$ as defined in (3.22), we have that as $x \to \infty$,
\begin{equation}
\varepsilon_4(x, \sigma_2, K, T) = (1 + o(1)) C \frac{(\log t_0)^{3 + \frac{4}{R \log t_0}}}{t_0^2}, \quad \text{with } C = 2c_1 e^{\frac{16w_1}{3R}} w_1^3, \text{ and } w_1 = 1 + \frac{c-1}{K},
\end{equation}
where $c_1$ is an admissible value for (ZDB) on some interval $[\sigma_1, 1]$. Moreover, both $\varepsilon_4(x, \sigma_2, K, T)$ and $\frac{\varepsilon_4(x, \sigma_2, K, T) t_0^2}{(\log t_0)^3}$ are decreasing in $x$ for $x > \exp(Re^2)$.
-/)]
theorem proposition_3_14 (I : Inputs) {c : вДЭ} (K : вДХ) (hc : c > 1) (hK : K вЙ• 2) :
    let tвВА : вДЭ вЖТ вДЭ := fun x вЖ¶ exp (sqrt (log x) / I.R)
    let T : вДЭ вЖТ вДЭ := fun x вЖ¶ (tвВА x)^c
    let ѕГвВВ : вДЭ вЖТ вДЭ := fun x вЖ¶ 1 - 2 / (I.R * log (tвВА x))
    let wвВБ : вДЭ := 1 + (c - 1) / K
    let C := 2 * (I.ZDB.cвВБ (ѕГвВВ 1)) * exp (16 * wвВБ / (3 * I.R)) * wвВБ^3
    let f : вДЭ вЖТ вДЭ := fun x вЖ¶ C * (log (tвВА x))^(3 + 4 / (I.R * log (tвВА x))) / (tвВА x)^2
    Asymptotics.IsEquivalent Filter.atTop (fun x вЖ¶ ќµвВД I (tвВА x) x (ѕГвВВ x) K (T x)) f
    вИІ AntitoneOn (fun x вЖ¶ ќµвВД I (tвВА x) x (ѕГвВВ x) K (T x)) (Set.Ioi (exp (I.R * exp 2))) вИІ AntitoneOn (fun x вЖ¶ (ќµвВД I (tвВА x) x (ѕГвВВ x) K (T x)) * (tвВА x)^2 / (log (tвВА x))^3) (Set.Ioi (exp (I.R * exp 2)))
    := by sorry

noncomputable def ќµ (I : Inputs) (xвВА ѕГвВВ c : вДЭ) (N K : вДХ) : вДЭ :=
  let tвВА := max (HѕГ I.HвВА I.R ѕГвВВ) (exp (sqrt (log xвВА) / I.R))
  let T := tвВА^c
  ќµвВБ xвВА T + ќµвВВ I xвВА 0.9 T + ќµвВГ I xвВА 0.9 ѕГвВВ N T + ќµвВД I tвВА xвВА ѕГвВВ K T

@[blueprint
"fks-theorem-1-1"
  (title := "FKS Theorem 1.1")
  (statement := /-- For any $x_0$ with $\log x_0 > 1000$, and all $0.9 < \sigma_2 < 1$, $2 \leq c \leq 30$, and $N, K \geq 1$ the formula $\varepsilon(x_0) := \varepsilon(x_0, \sigma_2, c, N, K)$ as defined in (4.1) gives an effectively computable bound
\[
E_\psi(x) \leq \varepsilon(x_0) \quad \text{for all } x \geq x_0.
\]
-/)]
theorem theorem_1_1 (I : Inputs) (xвВА ѕГвВВ c : вДЭ) (N K : вДХ) (hlog : log xвВА > 1000) (hѕГвВВ : ѕГвВВ вИИ Set.Ioo 0.9 1) (hc : c вИИ Set.Icc 2 30) (hN : N вЙ• 1) (hK : K вЙ• 1) : вИА x вЙ• xвВА, EѕИ x вЙ§ ќµ I xвВА ѕГвВВ c N K := by sorry

/-

@[blueprint
"fks-theorem-1-1b"
  (title := "FKS Theorem 1.1b")
  (statement := /-- Moreover, a collection of values, $\varepsilon(x_0)$ computed with well chosen parameters are provided in Table 5.
-/)]
theorem theorem_1_1b {log_x0 ѕГ2 c N K ќµ1 ќµ2 ќµ3 ќµ4 ќµ_total : вДЭ}
    (h : (log_x0, ѕГ2, ќµ1, ќµ2, ќµ3, ќµ4, ќµ_total) вИИ table_5) : вИА x, log x вЙ• log_x0 вЖТ EѕИ x вЙ§ ќµ_total :=
  by sorry



noncomputable def A (xвВА : вДЭ) : вДЭ :=
  if log xвВА < 1000 then 0 -- junk value
  else if log xвВА < 2000 then 338.3058
  else if log xвВА < 3000 then 263.2129
  else if log xвВА < 4000 then 233.0775

@[blueprint
  "fks-theorem-1-2b"
  (title := "FKS Theorem 1.2b")
  (statement := /--
  If $\log x_0 \geq 1000$ then we have an admissible bound for $E_\psi$ with the indicated choice of $A(x_0)$, $B = 3/2$, $C = 2$, and $R = 5.5666305$.
  -/)]
theorem theorem_1_2b (xвВА : вДЭ) (h : log xвВА вЙ• 1000) : EѕИ.classicalBound (A xвВА) (3/2) 2 5.5666305 xвВА := by sorry


@[blueprint "fks_cor_13"
  (title := "FKS1 Corollary 1.3")
  (statement := /-- For all x > 2 we have $E_ѕИ(x) \leq 121.096 (\log x/R)^{3/2} \exp(-2 \sqrt{\log x/R})$ with $R = 5.5666305$. -/)
  (uses := ["classical-bound-psi"])
  (latexEnv := "theorem")]
theorem FKS_corollary_1_3 :
  EѕИ.classicalBound 121.096 (3/2) 2 5.5666305 2 := sorry

@[blueprint "fks_cor_14"
  (title := "FKS1 Corollary 1.4")
  (statement := /-- For all x > 2 we have $E_ѕИ(x) \leq 9.22022(\log x)^{3/2} \exp(-0.8476836 \sqrt{\log x})$. -/)
  (proof := /-- TODO. -/)]
theorem FKS_corollary_1_4 :
  EѕИ.classicalBound 9.22022 (3/2) 0.8476836 1 2 := sorry


end FKS
